timeline_events.title: Victim leaves home
timeline_events.description: R. Suresh departs his residence at 14/2 Pycrofts Road, Triplicane. Captured on residential CCTV.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Normal movement pattern detected. Victim headed towards Chennai Central on foot. No signs of distress or coercion in gait analysis.

timeline_events.title: UPI Transfer to Suspect S-118
timeline_events.description: ₹40,000 transferred from victim's HDFC account to Vetri (S-118) via Google Pay UPI. Transaction ID: UPI-TXN-88412.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Financial link established. ₹40,000 UPI transfer from R. Suresh to Vetri (S-118) sets up financial motive 90 min before estimated TOD.

timeline_events.title: CCTV Spots Victim at E-Gate 4
timeline_events.description: Victim captured walking through E-Gate 4, Chennai Central Station. Frame clarity: high. Face match confidence: 95%.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Victim seen at E-Gate 4. CCTV-0412 timestamp verified against NTP master. Consistent with movement trajectory from Triplicane.

timeline_events.title: Phone Tower Overlap Detected
timeline_events.description: Both victim (VIC-PH-9843) and suspect (SUS-PH-4421) phones connected to Tower 4492 simultaneously. Signal overlap begins.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Both phones in same tower area. Victim and Vetri (S-118) within 500m of each other from 20:22–20:51. Proximity confirmed via triangulation.

timeline_events.title: Physical Altercation Captured
timeline_events.description: CCTV-0412 captures physical confrontation between two individuals at E-Gate 4 loading bay. 6 key frames extracted. Motion blur indicates rapid movement.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Victim and suspect co-located. Altercation captured in 6 clear frames at 20:42. Key evidence of physical confrontation. Object consistent with iron rod detected in frames 13290–13301.

timeline_events.title: Timestamp Anomaly — CCTV-0418
timeline_events.description: CCTV-CHN-0418 shows +6 minute drift from NTP master clock. Frames timestamped 20:54 may actually correspond to 20:48 actual time.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Possible timestamp manipulation or clock drift. +6 minute offset detected. Could create false alibi window for suspect. Camera scheduled for forensic clock extraction.

timeline_events.title: Victim Phone — Last Signal
timeline_events.description: Victim's phone (VIC-PH-9843) transmits final signal to Tower 4492 at 20:51. IMEI goes dark after this point. No further network activity.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Victim's device goes dark at 20:51 — consistent with incapacitation or device destruction during the altercation window (20:42–20:55).

timeline_events.title: Eyewitness Statement — Anandhi K.
timeline_events.description: Anandhi K. (tea stall owner, 52F) states she saw the victim near E-Gate 4 at approximately 20:14. Reports hearing raised voices around 20:40. Did not directly witness the assault.
timeline_events.source: Witness Interview / E-4 Flower Bazaar PS
timeline_events.ai_insight: Witness saw argument near station. Statement consistent with CCTV-0412 timeline. Reliable eyewitness — placed within 40m of event location.

timeline_events.title: Autopsy — TOD Estimation
timeline_events.description: Post-mortem examination narrows time of death to 19:30–21:00 based on rigor mortis, livor mortis, algor mortis (core temp 31.2°C), and vitreous potassium (6.1 mmol/L).
timeline_events.ai_insight: TOD window narrowed. Vitreous K+ 6.1 mmol/L + rigor mortis → TOD 19:30–21:00. Consistent with CCTV altercation at 20:42.

timeline_events.title: Suspect Vehicle Exits Crime Area
timeline_events.description: ANPR camera captures TN-09-AC-4421 (white Maruti Ertiga) leaving Chennai Central area via EVR Salai. Vehicle registered to Murugan K. — known associate of S-118.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Suspect vehicle identified. TN-09-AC-4421 linked to S-118 associate. Exits scene 73 min post estimated TOD. Possible getaway vehicle.

timeline_events.title: DNA Match — Sample D-77
timeline_events.description: STR profiling of blood sample D-77 (collected from victim's occipital wound) confirms mixed DNA. Minor contributor matches suspect S-118 (Vetri) at 99.2% confidence across 15 loci.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Strong biological evidence. STR profiling confirms DNA from occipital wound = Vetri (S-118) at 99.2%. Primary forensic link between suspect and victim at point of injury.

timeline_events.title: Witness #2 — Auto Driver Statement
timeline_events.description: Auto driver Tamil Selvan reports seeing a person matching S-204 description near E-Gate 4 at approximately 22:10. However, S-204's phone shows no tower activity in the area.
timeline_events.source: Witness Interview / E-4 Flower Bazaar PS
timeline_events.ai_insight: Second witness corroborates presence but contradicts digital evidence. Places S-204 at scene — however S-204's phone shows no tower activity in the area. Inconsistency flagged for review.

timeline_events.title: Toxicology Report — Diazepam Detected
timeline_events.description: Rapid toxicology screening detects trace diazepam (0.03 mg/L) in victim's femoral blood. Concentration is sub-therapeutic, suggesting ingestion 4–6 hours before death.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Drug traces detected. Diazepam at sub-therapeutic level suggests involuntary sedation prior to assault. Consistent with S-118's background as known drug supplier in North Chennai area.

timeline_events.title: AI Hypothesis — Motive Analysis
timeline_events.description: AEGIS AI model generates hypothesis: Financial dispute over ₹40,000 likely escalated into premeditated assault. S-118 had prior record of violent debt collection. Probability score: 78%.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Motive hypothesis generated. Financial dispute over ₹40,000 likely escalated into premeditated assault. S-118 is primary suspect per AI model. Supporting evidence: financial link, DNA match, CCTV, phone co-location.

timeline_events.title: Movement Reconstruction Complete
timeline_events.description: Full movement paths reconstructed for both victim and suspect using phone GPS, tower pings, CCTV timestamps, and witness statements. Routes converge at E-Gate 4 at 20:42.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Routes overlap at E-Gate 4. Movement reconstruction confirms both victim and suspect converged at 20:42 — matching altercation time exactly. Victim route: Triplicane → Central. Suspect route: North Chennai → Central.

timeline_events.title: Statement Contradiction Detected
timeline_events.description: Cross-referencing witness statements: Anandhi K. places argument at 20:40, but CCTV-0418 (with +6 min drift) shows different activity at adjusted timestamp. Auto driver timeline also conflicts.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Witness timing conflicts with CCTV-0418 adjusted timeline. Anandhi K. testimony is broadly consistent, but auto driver's statement about S-204 cannot be corroborated. Contradiction flagged — requires further investigation.

timeline_events.title: Crime Scene Reconstruction
timeline_events.description: Complete weapon → injury → blood sample chain: Iron rod (600g, 87cm) → 3 occipital impacts → DNA B-09 (victim blood on weapon) + D-77 (suspect DNA in wound). Weapon discarded 100m NE in drainage canal.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Cause of death linked. Iron rod → head trauma → blood sample B-09 chain established. Weapon discarded 100m post-assault — partial fingerprint matches S-118 at 74% confidence.

timeline_events.title: Final AI Narrative Generated
timeline_events.description: AEGIS AI has generated a complete narrative reconstruction with 90% overall confidence. All major evidence streams (CCTV, DNA, phone, financial, forensic) converge on S-118 as primary suspect.
timeline_events.ai_insight: Victim R. Suresh left home at 18:10. He reached E-Gate 4 by 20:14 where he met suspect S-118 (Vetri). A financial dispute over ₹40,000 likely escalated. Physical altercation captured on CCTV at 20:42. Victim was assaulted with an iron rod causing 3 occipital impacts with fatal head trauma. TOD estimated 20:30–21:00. Suspect fled north, vehicle spotted at 22:14. DNA evidence (99.2%), CCTV footage, phone co-location, and financial motive all converge. S-118 is the primary suspect with 90% confidence.
